component.name: Slashmad FFmpeg GUI
component.summary: GTK4 FFmpeg capture, editing, and encoding workflow for slashmad

description.p: Slashmad FFmpeg GUI is a GTK4 desktop frontend for FFmpeg focused on analog capture, post-capture cleanup, and controlled exports.

ul.li: Capture VHS and other analog sources from USB, PCI, and PCIe hardware.
Monitor live video and audio, then trim and inspect files inside the app.
Export archive, delivery, or proxy outputs with explicit FFmpeg settings.
Review hardware acceleration support and exact generated FFmpeg commands.
